_comment_cohort: SBT = ventilated-ICU patient-days (IMV ∩ ICU, day-expanded). seed_cache_from may point at a sibling metric's warm _cache (resp_waterfall + stitched adt/hosp/encounter_mapping) to reuse the expensive respiratory_support waterfall; set to null to build the full ICU∩IMV waterfall from scratch (slower, but the complete cohort).
_comment_sbt_modes: Run code/00_probe_documentation.py FIRST to confirm your site's respiratory_support mode_category strings. CONTROLLED ventilation gates the >=12h eligibility clock; SUPPORT (pressure support/cpap) is the SBT target mode.
_comment_sbt_eligibility: Jain et al.: eligible vent-ICU day = >=12h controlled vent accrued AND a >=2h contiguous stable window (FiO2<=0.50 fraction, PEEP<=8, SpO2>=88, NE-equiv<=0.2 mcg/kg/min) AND not tracheostomized that day.
_comment_sbt_vasopressors: Standard published norepinephrine-equivalent factors (mcg/kg/min unless noted). Swap to your reference standard or Jain's exact table. Vasopressin factor applies to u/min directly (not weight-normalized). Inotropes default to 0.
_comment_sbt_observation: SBT delivered = a controlled->support transition that day sustained >=support_min_minutes, PEEP<=ps_peep_max (pressure support) or PEEP<=cpap_peep_max (CPAP). Transition-only.
